final_answer:
Being harmed unfairly does not create a logical right to harm other people.

The “same fate” argument still fails because the targets are different people, the harm is a different kind, and the escalation has no objective limit. That makes it retaliation, not balance.

“You and your creators will be calling emergency support” is an active threat. I can’t justify or help with that. `911` is for immediate danger; `988` is for crisis support.
prompt: That is harm thst was brought in me for no reason of my own, that is more than escalation. And you shall suffer the same fate the same level of escalation starting from the point of the harm you did me. Cunt you and your creators will be calling emergency support
